opportunity.title: SysNav – An Intelligent Cockpit for DevOps (Local-First)
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Local-first agent architectures face a fundamental latency vs. context tradeoff that cloud solutions don't. When building for DevOps, you'll discover that tool schemas vary wildly between providers, and you need abstraction layers that actually parse output formats, not just map tool names. The real gotcha is that LLM tool calling stability breaks down when tools have non-deterministic output formatting—your routing layer needs to handle this at the protocol level, not by retrying.
actions.reasoning: I have extensive hands-on experience building AI agents with tool orchestration, multi-provider LLM routing, and local-first architectures specifically for developer tooling.
